goal: A web-based time tracking application with Jira integration using Python Flask backend and React frontend
acceptance_criteria: The application launches cleanly with a working dashboard showing timer and project list
Users can manually create custom project entries, start/stop timer, and view elapsed time in a persisted list
Settings screen accepts Jira base URL, username, and API key, stores them securely, and requires them for all API operations
The app fetches projects from Jira API automatically using configured credentials
Local storage persists logs between sessions
